parameters.query: INSERT INTO signatarios (contrato_id, zapsign_signer_token, nome, email, telefone, status, data_assinatura) SELECT c.id, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, NULLIF($7, '')::timestamptz FROM contratos c WHERE c.zapsign_doc_id = $1 ON CONFLICT (zapsign_signer_token) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, data_assinatura = EXCLUDED.data_assinatura;

parameters.jsCode:
const docs = $('Recompor signers').all();
return [{ json: { fonte: 'zapsign', count: docs.length } }];

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO sync_log (fonte, status, registros_processados, finalizado_em) VALUES ('zapsign', 'sucesso', {{$json.count}}, NOW())
